mapper.select: SELECT P.PRODUCT_NO , P.PRODUCT_NAME , I.AMOUNT , P.PRICE , I.IMAGE FROM PRODUCT P JOIN INVENTORY I ON P.PRODUCT_NO = I.PRODUCT_NO WHERE P.PRICE < 0 ORDER BY P.PRODUCT_NO OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY
SELECT PRODUCT_NO , CREATE_DATE , PRODUCT_NAME , PRICE WHERE PRODUCT_NO = #{productNo}
SELECT PRODUCT_NO , AMOUNT , IMAGE FROM INVENTORY WHERE PRODUCT_NO = #{productNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE INVENTORY SET AMOUNT = AMOUNT - 1 WHERE PRODUCT_NO = #{productNo}
